popularStory.headline: Sibyl de Neufmarché, Countess of Hereford, suo jure Lady of Brecknock (c. 1100-after 1143)
popularStory.description: Sibyl de Neufmarché, Countess of Hereford, suo jure Lady of Brecknock (c. 1100-after 1143), was a Cambro-Norman noblewoman, heiress to one of the most substantial fiefs in the Welsh Marches. The great …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Neufmarché於1100年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔時，她的父親Bernard of Neufmarché51歲，母親Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern22歲。她於1112年5月與Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1143年之後在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Neufmarché于1100年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔时，她的父亲Bernard of Neufmarché51岁，母亲Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern22岁。她于1112年5月与Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1143年之后在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾利藍尼 澤庫達 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Neufmarché was born in 1100, in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales, her father, Bernard of Neufmarché, was 51 and her mother, Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, was 22. She married Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford in May 1112. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1143, in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England, and was buried in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Neufmarché est née en 1100, à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Bernard of Neufmarché, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford en mai 1112. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1143, à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Neufmarché 1100 in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard of Neufmarché 51 und ihre Mutter Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern 22. Sie hat im Mai 1112 Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1143 in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Neufmarché è nata il nel 1100 nel Brecon, Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Bernard of Neufmarché, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford nel maggio 1112. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1143, nel Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Neufmarchéが1100年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンで生まれた時，父Bernard of Neufmarchéは51歳，母Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbernは22歳であった。1112年5月にMiles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1143年以後にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーで死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアランソニー セクウンダ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Neufmarché(이)가 1100년 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard of Neufmarché(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1112년 5월 Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 이후 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에서 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 랜서니 세쿤다 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Neufmarché nasceu em 1100, em Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Bernard of Neufmarché, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford em maio de 1112. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1143, em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Neufmarché родилась в 1100 г. в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Bernard of Neufmarché было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford май 1112 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1143 г. в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности ллантони секунда приори, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Neufmarché nació en 1100, en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Bernard of Neufmarché, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Agnes aka Nesta FitzOsbern, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Miles Fitzwalter Of Gloucester 1st Earl Of Hereford en mayo de 1112. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1143, en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Llanthony Secunda Priory, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
